title: Sidecar Frontmatter (format_version 3 / 5)
description: JSON Schema for sidecar frontmatter emitted by the codebase-to-contracts skill. Mirrors src-tauri/src/sidecar/frontmatter.rs::ContractFrontmatter field-for-field. Plan 14-01b's __tests__/frontmatter-writer.test.mjs verifies parity programmatically.
$comment: RUST-VS-JSON PARITY CONTRACT (Phase 14 revision Issue 12). Every non-Option<T> / non-#[serde(default)] field on the Rust ContractFrontmatter struct MUST appear in this schema's required[] array. Reference: contract-ide/src-tauri/src/sidecar/frontmatter.rs lines 39-105. Required Rust fields (non-Option<T>, no serde default): format_version, uuid, kind, level. Optional Rust fields (Option<T>, may be null): parent, code_hash, contract_hash, route, derived_at, rollup_hash, rollup_state, rollup_generation, members. Default-able Rust fields (#[serde(default)], absent => default value): neighbors=[], code_ranges=[], human_pinned=false, section_hashes={}, rollup_inputs=[]. The skill's bootstrap output emits ALL fields explicitly (even Option<T> as null and default-able as []/{}/false) so the JSON Schema requires the FULL surface — that gives downstream Rust serde a stable shape to deserialize without surprises. The skill emits format_version=3 for non-flow nodes and format_version=5 for kind:flow nodes (FLOW-01).

format_version.description: 3 for non-flow contracts; 5 for kind:flow contracts (FLOW-01).

uuid.description: Stable identity. v5 deterministic from path + element location at bootstrap.

level.description: Hierarchy level. L0=repo, L1=area, L2=subsystem/flow, L3=component/endpoint, L4=atom.

parent.description: Parent UUID (or null for L0 / orphan).

neighbors.description: Lateral relationships. Empty at bootstrap; Phase 13 sidebar derives.

code_ranges.description: Source code anchors. Empty for kind:flow. For UI L4, tightened in Stage 4 to wrap exactly the JSX element.

code_hash.description: SHA-256 of source bytes spanning code_ranges. null at bootstrap; Phase 6 derivation fills on first re-derive.

contract_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonicalized contract body. null at bootstrap; Phase 6 fills.

human_pinned.description: User-pinned via Inspector. false at bootstrap.

route.description: For UI: '/path'. For API: 'METHOD /path' (e.g. 'DELETE /api/account'). null for non-routable kinds.

derived_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last Phase 6 derivation. null at bootstrap.

name.description: Optional author-supplied display name. When present, takes precedence over scanner-side derivation (route → first-sentence intent → file basename → 'untitled-<uuid>'). Bootstrap pipelines should emit a non-empty name when classify can produce one; absent (omitted entirely) is preferred over empty string.

section_hashes.description: Per-section SHA-256 hashes (lowercased H2 names). Empty {} at bootstrap; Phase 8 lazy-migrates on first write.

rollup_hash.description: Most-recent rollup hash. null at bootstrap.

rollup_state.description: 'untracked' at bootstrap. IDE upgrades to 'fresh' on first PROP-02 recompute.

rollup_generation.description: Monotonic counter for optimistic locking. 0 at bootstrap.

members.description: FLOW-01 ordered member UUIDs. Required when kind=='flow' (>=2 entries: trigger + >=1 participant); absent on all other kinds.
